Ancestry Templates.text:
族裔模板

在这里你会找到一组模板，用于改变你的NPC的族裔。它们收录于《佣兵市场 第1卷》，其中包含《探路者 第二版 核心规则书》中六种常见族裔的模板：矮人、精灵、侏儒、地精、半身人和人类。

分步说明

步骤 1. 选择族裔

选择一个族裔模板。提供了两种类型的族裔模板：

能力加值模板会为NPC提供该族裔的基础特性（黑暗视觉、速度、族裔HP等）、基于该族裔所赋予的能力加值所带来的收益或惩罚，并提示你在步骤2中从列表里为该族裔选择一个传承。

步骤 3. 应用模板

将你在步骤1所选的族裔模板拖拽到你选择的NPC指示物或角色卡上以应用。将其放到指示物或卡片上后，会弹出一个提示，询问你想为你的NPC应用哪一种传承。该提示会提供一个下拉列表，列出该族裔所包含的传承。若你正在应用 Ancestry, Human (Ability Boost) 模板，它会先询问你希望应用哪一种能力加值，然后再提示你选择传承。族裔模板会自动应用适当的加值与惩罚，并使用授予物品规则元素，将所选传承添加到你的NPC上。

步骤 4. 手动调整

许多族裔都有一些无法自动化的小调整。对于大多数NPC，你需要手动调整已知语言，以包含其族裔所授予的语言。若你所选的族裔或传承提高了NPC的最大HP，你还需要手动更新其当前HP以匹配。你也需要在此步骤中应用你所选族裔或传承上列出的任何其他手动调整。若你应用模板的NPC原本就有一个非人类（特征）的既存族裔特征，你需要手动将其移除。

步骤 5. 自定义（可选）

这些模板旨在让你能够快速调整个别生物，使其在不增加大量复杂度的情况下，感觉像属于某个特定族裔。若你正在创建一个NPC，并希望其族裔成为其角色的重要元素，且你希望这能在其机制中有所体现，你可以考虑添加一到两个族裔专长。专长类型的物品无法添加到NPC，因此你需要将专长转换为一个具有适当动作花费的动作；对于没有动作花费的专长，则使用被动动作来表示。

用法

如上所述，族裔模板有两种类型：能力加值模板与仅传承模板。前者包含基于各族裔标准能力分数加值的收益，而后者不包含。两种模板都不是完全的平衡中立。拥有族裔模板的NPC会比没有族裔模板的NPC略强或更灵活。一般来说，当你希望NPC的族裔与传承在机制上体现在其角色上时，我建议使用这些族裔模板；在能力加值与仅传承模板之间的选择，本质上是你希望该角色的传承与族裔对机制影响程度的选择。

如果你想设计一个NPC，其族裔在其角色或背景中更为核心，如步骤5所述，添加1-2个适当等级的、已转换的族裔专长，是强化该角色主题的绝佳方式。

如果你希望有一个机制更轻量的选项，用于那些族裔不那么重要的NPC，我建议你查看《GM指南》第5章“使用NPC画廊”章节中包含的族裔调整，或应用一个仅传承模板并选择不选择传承。

设计理念

族裔模板被设计为可用于《佣兵市场 第1卷》中包含的各类NPC，以及Paizo发布的那些NPC。我假设你应用任何族裔模板的NPC都是人类，因此，模板会在存在时自动移除人类（特征），但NPC拥有的任何其他既存族裔特征都不会被移除。虽然人类是默认底线，但若你应用模板的NPC体型不同于中型，它仍会被调整为你所选族裔模板的适当体型。

创建族裔模板的主要设计目标，是在不过度影响游戏平衡的前提下，捕捉各族裔的核心感觉。对我而言，捕捉这种感觉的关键之一，是让最终结果反映族裔能力加值，使得玩家能够正确推断：矮人会比平均更强健，而精灵或半身人会更灵巧。

直接提高能力分数被证明是不平衡的；即便用抵消惩罚来反制其效果，若NPC恰好把某个获得能力加值的能力作为关键能力，它们会明显更有效；而若不是，则会明显更弱。为反制这些问题，我为每项能力制定了一组可授予的收益/惩罚，它们在彼此提供的收益强度上相对一致，同时也符合游戏机制的风格。最终结果有些不完美：六项能力彼此并非完全平衡，且这些效果也并不完全限制为匹配玩家角色从每个能力加值中会获得的收益。然而，这些收益会产生在机制上可靠、同时对你的玩家而言有趣且易于识别的结果。

力量 （打击伤害+1（适用于近战、投掷与推进打击）以及运动+1）。

敏捷 （反射豁免+1，特技+1，隐匿+1，以及盗窃+1）。

体质 （强韧豁免+1，以及每等级HP+1）

智力 （技能检定+1）

感知 （意志豁免+1，察觉+1，医疗+1，自然+1，宗教+1，以及生存+1）

魅力 （法术伤害+1，以及欺瞒+1，交涉+1，威吓+1，以及表演+1）

力量在许多方面是最容易设计的之一。运动是一项相当强力的技能，许多生物都拥有；而且几乎所有生物都有某种造成打击伤害的选项。并且，与改变NPC的力量相关攻击掷骰相比，这两项收益/惩罚的影响都相对较小。

敏捷则难得多，最终结果也略强于力量。把对AC与敏捷相关攻击掷骰的收益从这些收益中剥离是显而易见的选择，但最终我决定保留对反射豁免的收益。虽然反射豁免的提升比+1伤害更可能影响玩法，但大多数施法者都能选择他们要以哪一种豁免为目标。作为玩家，看到半身人、精灵或地精就能意识到“哦，这个NPC会更难被以反射为目标的能力命中”，这种感觉很好，因为它强化了可信度。最后，我已经知道我希望为体质加入强韧豁免的加值，而给体质加豁免却不给敏捷加豁免，会让我觉得这会削弱我塑造可信度的尝试。加入各项以敏捷为关键的技能加值，在许多相同的理由下也是重要的。

体质也相当容易：每等级1点的HP小幅提升与强韧豁免加值，基本就是我希望能力加值所授予收益的底线强度。唯一需要注意的是，确保体质加值不会在等级-1或等级0的NPC上产生反直觉的效果；为防止这种情况，用于计算HP提升的等级被设置为最小值1。

智力是这个家族里的异类：虽然它的许多技能对于回忆知识极其有用，但就我的经验而言，NPC很少进行回忆知识检定；而授予额外的受训技能也很难在不显得笨重的前提下实现自动化。我达成的折中方案，是让它使所有技能提高1点，以反映更聪明的生物有机会提升更广泛的技能。鉴于大多数NPC只有少数经常使用的技能，而在绝大多数技能上未受训，这项收益的范围在很多方面被限制在每个生物经常使用的那些技能上，这大致符合我希望这些能力加值具备的强度。法术与效果的DC之所以被排除，原因与力量和敏捷加值不影响攻击掷骰的原因基本相同。

感知是另一项最终比我理想中更强的能力：出于与敏捷讨论过的相同原因，我希望在能力加值收益中包含意志豁免。而察觉既是一般意义上用于反制PC隐匿检定的有用属性，同时也最常用于决定先攻掷骰，因此也是一项强力收益。好的一面是，感知相关的技能——医疗、宗教、自然与生存——虽然有用，但NPC使用频率通常较低，这有助于让感知不至于成为无可匹敌的明星；相反，它最终略高于平均水平，就像敏捷一样。

魅力与智力处境相似：欺瞒与威吓是NPC常用的技能，但魅力相较于其他能力加值似乎提供的收益不足。我查看了其他加值已经包含的内容后意识到：我已经有了对每项豁免的加值、对打击伤害与HP的加值，但没有对法术伤害的加值；这正好能作为打击伤害的一个良好对照。鉴于魅力是所有天生魔法的默认能力，这似乎也是容纳这种“法术威力提升”的最合适能力。

当然，在设计完这些收益之后，我意识到任何拥有族裔的NPC，相比没有族裔的NPC，都会获得净收益——即便不考虑其从基础族裔或传承中得到的任何东西。如果我们把人类视为默认，那么你所有的人类NPC都会比其他NPC略弱且更无趣；为反制这一点，我加入了一个人类族裔，其仅有一个加值，并且其强度大致等同于其他族裔模板。

如果你将能力加值模板一致地应用于你所有的NPC，它们的有效性会出现一个小但明显的提升；根据我的经验，我认为这个提升不会改变任何单个生物的有效等级，但当它一致地应用于所有NPC时，它可能会例如把一个刚刚低于“极端”的遭遇提高到“极端”。对于不希望如此的GM，或许尤其是正在运行Paizo冒险路径、其玩家可能已经在难度上挣扎的GM，更适合使用对NPC影响较小的模板。基于这个原因，我最终加入了同样的模板、同样的传承等内容，但不含任何能力加值；这些模板会以略微牺牲可信度为代价，对遭遇平衡产生小得多的影响。

族裔传承主要基于《探路者 第二版 核心规则书》中为六种常见族裔所列出的传承。然而，其中一些传承很难以令人满意的方式自动化，或在其他方面不适合用于NPC。为确保每个族裔都有足够数量可用的传承，还额外发明了一些传承，它们的灵感来自该族裔的1级族裔专长。

Ancestry Templates

Here you'll find a collection of templates that allow you to alter the ancestries of your NPCs. Included in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, you'll find templates for the six common ancestries from the Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook: Dwarves, Elves, Gnomes, Goblins, Halflings, and Humans.

Stepwise Instructions

Step 1. Select Ancestry

Select an Ancestry Template. There are two types of Ancestry Template provided:

Ability Boost Templates will provide the NPC with the base features of the ancestry (darkvision, speed, ancestry HP, etc.), benefits or penalties based on the Ability Boosts granted by that ancestry, and prompt you to select a heritage for that ancestry from those listed in Step 2.

Step 2. Select Heritage

Step 3. Apply Template

Apply your selected Ancestry Template from Step 1 by dragging it to the NPC token or character sheet of your choice. After you have dropped it on the token or sheet, a prompt will pop up asking which heritage you would like to apply to your NPC. The prompt will present a dropdown with the list of included heritages for that ancestry. If you are applying the Ancestry, Human (Ability Boost) template, it will first ask which ability boost you wish to apply, and then prompt you to select a heritage. The Ancestry Template will automatically apply the appropriate bonuses and penalties and, using the grant item rule element, add the selected heritage to your NPC.

Step 4. Manual Adjustments

Many of the ancestries have small adjustments that could not be automated. For most NPCs, you will need to manually adjust the languages known to include those granted by their ancestry. If the ancestry or heritage you have selected increases the NPC's maximum HP, then you will also need to manually update their current HP to match. You will want to apply any other manual adjustments listed on your chosen ancestry or heritage during this step. If the NPC you have applied the template to had a pre-existing ancestry trait that was not human, you will need to remove that manually.

Step 5. Customize (Optional)

These templates are designed to allow you to quickly adjust individual creatures to make them feel like they belong to a specific ancestry without adding a lot of complexity. If you are creating an NPC for whom you wish their ancestry to be an important element of their character, and you would like that to be reflected in their mechanics, you might consider adding an ancestry feat or two. Items of the feat type cannot be added to NPCs so you will need to convert the feat to an action with an appropriate action cost, using passive actions to represent feats with no action cost.

Usage

As mentioned above, there are two types of Ancestry Templates, Ability Boost Templates and Heritage Only Templates. The former include benefits based on the standard ability score boosts for each ancestry, while the latter do not. Neither of the templates is completely balance neutral. An NPC with an Ancestry Template will be slightly more powerful or flexible than an NPC without one. Generally, I recommend using the included Ancestry Templates when you would like an NPC's ancestry and heritage to be reflected mechanically in their character, with the choice between Ability Boost and Heritage Only Templates being a choice about the level of mechanical impact you want the character's heritage and ancestry to have.

If you want to design an NPC whose ancestry is more central to their character or backstory, adding 1-2 converted ancestry feats of an appropriate level, as mentioned in Step 5,  is an excellent way to reinforce the theme of that character. 

If you would like a mechanically lighter option, for NPCs where their ancestry is of less importance, I suggest taking a look at the ancestry adjustments included in the "Using the NPC Gallery" section in Chapter 5 of the Gamemastery Guide, or applying one of the Heritage Only Templates and choosing not to select a heritage. 

Design Philosophy

The Ancestry Templates were designed to be usable with the various NPCs included in Mercenary Market Volume 1, and with those published by Paizo. I had made the assumption that the NPC you are applying any Ancestry Template to is human, consequently, the template will automatically remove the human trait if it is present, but any other pre-existing ancestry traits that the NPC has are not removed. While human is the assumed baseline, if the NPC you are applying the template to is of a size different than medium, it will still be adjusted to the appropriate size for the Ancestry Template you have selected.

The primary design goal in creating the Ancestry Templates was to create something that captured the core feeling of the various ancestries, while not having a dramatic impact on game balance. For me, a key part of capturing the feeling of the various ancestries was to reflect the ancestry ability boosts in the final result, such that a player could correctly infer that a dwarf would be hardier than average, while an elf or halfling would be more nimble.

A straight increase to the ability scores proved imbalanced, as even with offsetting penalties to counteract its effects it produced NPCs that were notably more effective if they happened to have one of the ability boost scores as a key ability, and notably less effective if they did not. To counteract these issues, I developed a set of benefits/penalties that could be granted for each ability that were relatively in line with one another in terms of the benefits they granted, while also feeling appropriate to the mechanics of the game. The final result is somewhat imperfect,  the six scores are not perfectly balanced with each other, and the effects are not entirely restricted to matching the benefits a player character would recieve for each ability boost. However, these benefits produce results results that are mechanically sound while being interesting and recognizable for your players. 

Strength (+1 to Strike Damage (with Melee, Thrown, and Propulsive Strikes) and Athletics).

Dexterity (+1 to Reflex Saves, Acrobatics, Stealth, and Thievery).

Constitution (+1 to Fortitude Saves, and +1 HP per level)

Intelligence (+1 to Skill Checks)

Wisdom (+1 to Will Saves, Perception, Medicine, Nature, Religion, and Survival)

Charisma (+1 to Spell Damage and Deception, Diplomacy, Intimidation, and Performance)

Strength was in many ways one of the easiest to design. Athletics is a fairly potent skill that many creatures possess, and virtually all creatures have an option to deal some form of strike damage. And both of these these benefits/penalties have a relatively small impact compared to altering the NPCs strength-based attack rolls. 

Dexterity was much harder to design, and it ended up slightly more potent that Strength. stripping out benefits to AC, and dexterity-based attack rolls from the benefits was a clear choice, but ultimately I decided a benefit to Reflex saves could stay. While a boost to Reflex saves is more likely to have a gameplay impact than +1 to damage, most spellcasters will have the ability to choose which save they target. Being able to look at a halfling, elf, or goblin as a player and go, oh, that NPC is going to be harder to hit with abilities that target Reflex feels good as it reinforces a sense of verisimilitude. And finally, I already knew I wanted to include a boost to Fortitude saves for Constitution, and including a save boost for Con and not Dex felt like it would undermine my attempts at creating verisimilitude. Including boosts of the various Dexterity keyed skills felt like an important thing to include for many of the same reasons. 

Constitution was also fairly easy, a small increase to HP of 1 per level and Fortitude saves felt like pretty much the baseline power level of the benefits I wanted an ability boost to grant. The only wrinkle was making sure that a Constitution boost on a level -1 NPC or a level 0 NPC didn't have a counterintuitive effect, to prevent that from occurring the level used to calculate the HP increase was set to a minimum value of 1. 

Intelligence was the black sheep of the family, while many of its skills are exceptionally useful for recalling knowledge it is fairly rare for NPCs to make recall knowledge checks in my experience, and granting additional trained skills was difficult to automate without being cumbersome. The compromise I reached was to have it increase all skills by 1, to reflect the opportunity a more intelligent creature would have to increase a broad variety of skills. Given that most NPCs have a handful of skills they use regularly while being untrained in the majority of skills the scope of this benefit is in many ways restrained to the skills each creature uses regularly, which falls roughly in line with the level of power I wanted these ability boosts to have. DCs for spells and effects were excluded for much the same reasons that Str and Dex boosts did not affect attack rolls. 

Wisdom is another ability that ended up more potent than I would like, for the same reasons discussed with Dexterity I wanted to include Will saves in the ability boost benefits. And with Perception being both a useful attribute in general for countering PC stealth checks, while also being the most common determinant of initiative rolls it is also a potent benefit. On the plus side, the Wisdom skills of Medicine, Religion, Nature, and Survival, while useful, tend to be less commonly used by NPCs, which helps keep Wisdom from being the unparalleled star of the show, instead it ends up slightly better than average like Dex.

Charisma was in a similar boat to intelligence, while Deception and Intimidation are commonly used NPC skills, Charisma didn't seem to offer up enough benefits compared to the other ability boosts. Looking at what all I already had for the other boosts I realized that I had bonuses to each save, bonuses to strike damage and to HP, but no bonus to spell damage which felt like a nice counterpoint to strike damage. Given that Charisma is the default ability for all innate magic, it felt like the most appropriate ability to house what amounted to a spell power boost. 

Now of course having designed all these benefits I realized that any NPC with an ancestry would end up with a net benefit compared to an NPC without one, even discounting anything the creature got from the base ancestry or heritage. If we treat humans as the default, then all your human NPCs will be slightly weaker and more boring than other NPCs, to counteract this I added a human ancestry with a single boost that is roughly equivalent in power to the other Ancestry Templates.

If you were to apply the Ability Boost templates uniformly to all your NPCs there would be a small but noticeable uptick in effectiveness; based on my experience I'd suggest this uptick doesn't alter the effective level of any individual creature, but when applied uniformly to all NPCs it could, for example, take an encounter that was just below severe up to severe. For GMs who don't want that, perhaps especially GMs that are running Paizo adventure paths whose players may already be struggling with the difficulty a template with a smaller effect on the NPCs would be preferable, for that reason I ended up including the same templates, heritages and all but without any ability boosts, these will have a much smaller effect on encounter balance, at the cost of a little loss of verisimilitude.

Ancestry heritages were primarily based on the heritages listed in the Pathfinder Second Edition Core Rulebook for each of the six common ancestries. However, some of the heritages were difficult to automate in a satisfying fashion or otherwise were ill-suited to use on an NPC. To ensure there were an acceptable number of heritages available for each ancestry, additional heritages were invented that were inspired by a level 1 ancestry feat from that ancestry.

Crew Templates.name: 船员模板 Crew Templates
Crew Templates.text:
小队模板

你将在这里找到将你收藏中的任何 NPC 转变为由 4 至 6 名个体协同作战的小队所需的模板。

这些模板将赋予“小队”特征。任何具有“小队”特征的生物，在法术与效果的适用上都被视为单一生物。不过，对于那些要求你选择两个相邻生物的能力（例如 swipe），它可以被选择两次。

说明

步骤 1. 选择模板

选择一个小队模板。这里提供了两个小队模板。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.he8dB3dDPXfxwvqS]{乌合之众小队模板}：生成的小队，其等级比基础生物高 2 级。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.47icmT7woJHJMgcT]{小队模板}：生成的小队，其等级比基础生物高 4 级。

步骤 2. 选择能力

从下表中为你的小队选择小队能力。若你在创建乌合之众小队，则选择 1 个能力；若你在创建标准小队，则选择 2 个。

这些能力代表小队作为一个整体所发展出的特殊训练或本领。能力被分为对所有小队都实用的通用能力，以及仅在基础生物为施法者时才有用的施法者专属能力。请注意，“同时施法”和“联合施法”为互斥能力。

通用能力

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.zwbPPISdac52ku8d]{小队 - 背靠背}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.8VQ8l4NBOWeZJa5j]{小队 - 保镖训练}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.qQr8EU5gOILBhUFM]{小队 - 附带伤害}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.ZX6fkGI4HIDHc34A]{小队 - 集体反射}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.aFlLqGxQHAxXN7Ei]{小队 - 集中突击}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.jBvwtuEbADjH6hkI]{小队 - 多样打击}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.VRsfcHdnWbleY4Ie]{小队 - 阵型训练}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.2Q1IH3aXxplPSl2h]{小队 - 前线防护}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.gVbDVVIUU9vF3WyC]{小队 - 掩护撤退}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4Czw6vnX2H2zR5ir]{小队 - 骚扰先锋}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.aLtn0QRuuK6BFXns]{小队 - 警觉小队}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.opZmfKuXmlz7uLmd]{小队 - 反应性惩戒}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.J9ikC1Sf7fIl7HFS]{小队 - 分散射击}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.BEOef5Eb4e4VPNMT]{小队 - 共享防御}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.PGfBmQ3ZWYDzJn55]{小队 - 熟练协作}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.B1wnTHuXLAwYe7wo]{小队 - 小队夹击}

施法者专属能力

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.9HNSMb8LzvDRBUyz]{小队 - 协作维持}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4e2sEVYnTv3ICZ01]{小队 - 联合召唤}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.z8va7l2NHRjP1bEr]{小队 - 同时施法}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.2BsmqN6oC9qgYj7C]{小队 - 联合施法}

步骤 3. 应用模板

将你在步骤 1 选定的小队模板拖拽到你选择的 NPC 代币或角色卡上以进行应用。当你将其放到代币或角色卡上后，你需要回答一个提示，询问你所应用模板的基础生物的体型。在你输入基础生物的体型后，后续提示将弹出，询问你想为新小队添加哪些能力。每个提示都会以字母顺序提供上述所有小队能力的下拉列表。在你完成选择后，模板将自动调整基础生物的属性数据，并使用授予物品规则元素自动把你选定的小队能力添加到基础生物上。

步骤 4. 手动调整

在应用你的小队模板并选择你的小队能力后，你可能还需要进行一些手动更改。首先，你会想要将小队的当前 HP 更新为与其新的最大 HP 相匹配。你也可能希望更新基础生物的名称，以反映它现在是一个小队。如果基础生物是施法者，并且你给予了它“联合召唤”“同时施法”或“联合施法”，你将需要根据相应小队能力的说明更新该生物的施法条目。这些说明可以在能力的描述标签页中找到，并位于标题“template”之后。你也可以参考 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{小队} 中的一些施法者，作为这三种能力如何修改基础生物施法条目的有用示例。 

请注意 - 虽然小队模板已修改了你的生物的打击，但由于 Foundry 上 PF2e 系统的 NPC 角色卡目前存在限制，修改后的数值不会显示在角色卡上；不过，在掷骰时伤害调整会正确应用。 

步骤 5. 自定义（可选）

弱与精英小队 - 如果你希望应用精英或弱模板以调整你创建的小队的强度，那么该调整应当现在进行。由于 Foundry VTT 中“弱/精英”调整的实现方式，应用顺序并不重要。你可以在应用小队模板之前或之后应用弱/精英调整。

具有族裔的小队 - 如果你希望生成某个特定族裔的小队，你也可以现在对你的小队应用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.QibnMkhhPYrIrwG5]{族裔模板} 之一。

额外的小队能力 - 小队模板旨在提升基础生物的力量，以体现一支生物团队协同作战的强度。虽然所授予的小队能力数量，是为了在两个模板版本的等级提升下提供足够的力量增长，但你可能会发现自己想要创建训练尤为精良或配合尤为默契的小队。在这种情况下，你可能希望从步骤 2 的表格中拖拽一个额外的小队能力到你的新小队上。或者，你也许想创建一支训练特别糟糕的小队；你可以通过让小队拥有比通常更少的小队能力来实现。 

具有描述性模板的小队 - 小队的数值计算是按基础生物的等级进行缩放构建的。如果你希望应用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ri8fswkWP7Bimh8l]{描述性模板}，你应当先应用它，再应用小队模板，以确保小队模板按预期运作。

警告 - 叠加小队模板与描述性模板，可能会产生比基于所列等级调整更强或更弱的结果。

背景设定上的合理性

为什么小队——由 4 至 6 名个体组成的团体——会像单一生物一样受到魔法与其他效果影响？我当然可以提供许多机制与平衡层面的理由，但我认为一个令人满意的答案需要在世界观内部讲得通。

关于小队如何运作的默认背景设定，是“交感魔法”。我所说的交感魔法，是指存在某种效果，使得施加在小队某一名成员身上的任何魔法都会在所有小队成员之间产生共振。我对这种交感魔法的根本成因准备了若干可能的解释；请随意为你的世界选择你最喜欢的一种、为不同的小队采用不同解释，或发明你自己的说法。

  • 仪式 - 小队经历了一场血液混融、纹身共享或类似的过程，将他们不论福祸地绑定在一起。该仪式使小队能够从原本只会影响其中一人的法术中获益，但作为交换，他们也都会受到那些原本只会以单一生物为目标的有害法术的影响。
  • 神祇介入 - 某位神祇格外热爱团队协作，并会对那些为同伴的利益而牺牲个人需求的人报以微笑。那些一同训练、并在面对敌人时行动如一的队伍，会获得该神祇的恩赐，使成员之间形成一张交感魔法之网。
  • 共情共振 - 交感魔法的联系并非真正的导管。可能只有单一生物会体验到某个效果，但无论是由于共情反应，还是由于该效果破坏了团队的凝聚力，作用在团体上的总体结果会与我们所期待的“如同施放在单一生物身上”相一致。

用法

小队模板的设计目标，是让你能够以最小的影响，安全地用同等级的小队替换任何单独生物，而不会明显破坏你的游戏平衡。如果你正在运行一场战役，其中大多数对手是类人生物，那么你可能希望随着队伍等级提升，提高他们所面对的小队所占比例。这样做将带来清晰的成长感：对手被迫派出更多数量的敌人，才能对你的队伍构成足够的挑战。若你将小队模板应用到玩家曾经面对过的敌人身上，这一点尤其有效。 

如果你愿意，小队甚至可以构成你战役中大部分对抗力量，而不会对战役平衡造成不当影响。不过，如果你选择这种做法，你会希望确保大部分宝藏来源于首领或剧情/成就奖励。小队携带的装备通常会远低于你队伍的等级。 

当然，并没有要求小队模板只能用于类人生物；任何体型介于超小型与大型之间的生物，都可以使用步骤 1 的模板转变为一个由多名生物组成的小队。这在高等级时尤为有用，因为那时你可能会发现可用于该模板的预制 NPC 更少。精类与异界生物是转变为高等级小队的首选目标。 

虽然小队被设计为代表玩家队伍的较弱敌人的团体，但如果你的叙事支持，小队也可以成为令人满意的首领遭遇。许多小队能力都会给予小队更好的动作经济，使遭遇更具动态性。

设计理念

小队的诞生，是为了反制“乌木甲匪徒”问题——这类问题常见于像《湮没》或《天际》那样采用基于等级缩放的游戏：随着玩家升级，整个世界也跟着升级，从而削弱成长的感觉，尤其当你的队伍面对的仍是相似的敌人时。小队的设计是为了反制这种体验：它让你能够轻松地把一群较低等级的对手投向玩家，同时仍能提供与其等级相称的挑战。通过扩大战斗的规模，它创造出一种进步感。若你将模板应用到队伍以前面对过的敌人身上，这一点尤其有效。 

显而易见的问题是：“为什么要发明小队？为什么不直接用军团（troops）？”答案是多方面的，但主要在于维持游戏平衡。若你用 Paizo 的军团替换玩家角色所面对的大量生物，AC 将变得在很大程度上无关紧要，而反射豁免会在决定队伍防御能力时扮演不成比例的重要角色。此外，在进攻端，军团防御会显著把游戏平衡推向使用低等级、可重复的区域效果法术——以此可靠触发军团弱点并绕过伤害阈值——同时让许多单一目标法术几乎无法使用。最后，军团在实际游戏中很难操作；其独特机制以及需要移动的大量单独代币（若你选择利用军团分散铺开的能力）会带来大量额外工作。这意味着军团最适合偶尔的遭遇，而不适合作为你战役的主力内容。

基于此，小队被设计为尽量减少对整体游戏平衡的改变，同时仍让玩家感觉他们正在与一大群敌人战斗。为此，我们加入了对区域效果与溅射伤害的轻微弱点，以保留“区域效果魔法对成群敌人特别有效”的感觉；并且小队可以被选择两次用于如 swipe 之类的能力，从而让那些专精于对付多个敌人的武艺角色在与小队作战时更有成就感并如鱼得水（注：这并非意在包含如 electric arc 这类不需要帮助的戏法；这也是为什么我把能力表述为“要求你选择两个相邻生物的效果”。但你也可以自行裁量，允许如 ricochet shot、through shot，甚至如 scorching ray 这样的法术第二次以该小队为目标。我建议若你选择这样做，应当偏向谨慎；如果某个能力被如此解读后强得不像真的，那它多半确实不该如此）。除此之外，小队的运作方式与单一生物完全一致，这意味着以单一生物为目标的法术与效果对小队都能正常运作。 这意味着除了一点对“专为对付成群敌人而设计的能力”的小幅增益以外，各种进攻能力的根本平衡得以保留。在防御端，小队拥有标准攻击，主要以 AC 为目标；偶尔某些生物拥有法术或能力，能够以豁免为目标——这与大多数图鉴中的其他生物一致，从而保持玩家可能选择的各类防御之间的平衡。 

现在，小队必须比基础生物更高等级，否则它们就无法达成上述目标。我希望小队的规模合理，能适配大多数战斗地图，因此选择了 4 至 6 名个体。并基于这样一种理解：紧密协作会让个体能够更靠近彼此，因此他们可以安全地占据一个大致等同于 4 个同体型个体所占用的区域。不幸的是，这带来一个副作用：由超大型或巨型生物组成的小队由于体型原因并不可行；这实在令人遗憾，我很喜欢“巨人小队”的概念。关于中型生物“4 格”的想法，自然引导我考虑采用 +4 的等级调整。为了确定小队模板对各项能力与属性应当提升多少，我使用了《GM 指南》中的生物构筑表作为底线，并查看生物提升 4 级时其检定与 DC 的平均增长幅度，然后仿照该幅度；但对低等级生物的提升幅度更低，以匹配 4 级及以下生物数值较慢的成长。

当你让一个生物提升 4 级时，单纯提高它的数值并不足以构成一个引人入胜的生物；它还应当拥有更强大、更有趣的能力。为此，我创建了步骤中列出的小队能力。这些能力的设计思路，是强化“一群个体协同合作、发挥巨大效果”的主题。和《雇佣兵市场 第 1 卷》中收录的许多其他能力一样，我总体上倾向于更主动的能力，其中许多被动能力则用于强化现有动作的能力。而其中最复杂的能力，是那些与施法相关的能力。

对于施法者而言，单纯提升数值不太可能产生令人满意或有效的对手，因此必须考虑另一种进阶方式。我创建了三个主要能力，用来强化小队的施法能力，同时强化“由较低等级法师协同作战的小队”这一主题：@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4e2sEVYnTv3ICZ01]{联合召唤}、@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.z8va7l2NHRjP1bEr]{同时施法} 与 @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.2BsmqN6oC9qgYj7C]{联合施法}。每个能力以不同方式强化小队的能力。联合召唤利用“多名召唤师协同召来强大生物为其效劳”的幻想，为小队提供额外的高威能法术位，且专门用于召唤法术；在三者中，它代表的力量提升幅度要小得多，因此可以与联合施法或同时施法之一并用。联合施法将“多名法师合力产生更宏大效果”的概念具体化：它提高基础生物的法术位等级，使其能够对既有的低等级法术进行升阶施放。最后，同时施法为小队提供更多较弱的法术，并允许它在每个回合将一个戏法与其某个法术同时施放；为平衡这份力量，它不会给予小队任何新的更高等级法术位，这意味着它的法术始终会低于队伍等级。鉴于联合施法与同时施法都代表显著的力量提升，这两者不能在同一支小队上同时使用。 

小队模板让你能够从现有 NPC 快速创建多种多样的小队。借助小队能力，你甚至可以通过选择不同的小队能力，从同一个基础生物生成不同的小队，以表现由相同敌人组成、但接受了不同训练的小队。 

最后一个难点是背景设定——我们要如何合理化：由 4 至 6 人组成的团体，会被各类法术与效果视作单一生物？我为此单独提供了一个下拉条目，列出我的背景设定理由，以免这一至关重要的细节淹没在这些冗长的讲述之中。

总之，我对最终结果相当满意：它让你能够运行一场以人类为主要对手的战役，而不必让对手也随着玩家不断升级；相反，你可以逐步撒入更多精英战士与副官，同时用小队填充对手军势的主体。尤其在低等级时，“乌合之众小队”的存在提供了 +2 的等级调整，能带来稳定的成长感。希望你在实际游戏中也能像我一样觉得它令人满意。

Crew Templates

Here you'll find the templates required to turn any NPC in your collection into a Crew of 4 to 6 individuals working in unison.

These templates will grant the Crew trait. Any creature with the Crew trait is treated as a single creature for the purposes of spells and effects. However, it may be selected twice for abilities that require you to select two adjacent creatures, such as swipe.

Instructions

Step 1. Select Template

Select a Crew Template. There are two Crew Templates provided.

The @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.he8dB3dDPXfxwvqS]{Ragtag Crew Template} which produces a Crew with a level 2-higher than that of the base creature.

The @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.47icmT7woJHJMgcT]{Crew Template} which produces a Crew with a level 4-higher than that of the base creature.

Step 3. Apply Template

Apply your selected Crew Template from Step 1 by dragging it to the NPC token or character sheet of your choice. After you have dropped it on the token or sheet, you will need to answer a prompt asking you the size of the base creature you have applied the template to. Once you have input the base creature's size, subsequent prompts will pop up asking which abilities you would like to add to your new Crew. Each prompt will present a dropdown of all of the Crew Abilities listed above, in alphabetical order. After you have made your selection(s) the template will automatically adjust the base creature's statistics, and use the grant item rule element to automatically add your selected crew abilities to the base creature.

Step 4. Manual Adjustments

After applying your Crew Template and selecting your Crew Ability(s), there are a few manual changes you may need to make. Firstly, you will want to update the Crew's current HP to match its new maximum HP. You may also wish to update the base creature's name to reflect that it is now a Crew. If the base creature was a spellcaster, and you have given it Joint Summoning, Simultaneous Casting, or United Casting, you will need to update the creature's spellcasting entries according to the instructions for the relevant Crew Ability. These instructions can be found in the abilities' description tab, and follow the heading, "template". You may also find taking a look at some of the spellcasters from @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{Crews} a useful example for how each of these three abilities modifies the base creature's spellcasting entries. 

Please Note - While the Crew Template has modified your creature's strikes, current limitations with the NPC sheets for the PF2e system on Foundry mean that the modified values  will not be displayed on the sheet, however the damage adjustment will apply correctly when rolled. 

Step 5. Customization (Optional)

Weak and Elite Crews - If you wish to apply an Elite or Weak template to adjust the strength of your created Crew, that adjustment should be applied now. The way Weak and Elite adjustments are implemented in Foundry VTT the order of application does not matter. You can apply the Weak/Elite adjustment either prior to, or after, applying your Crew Template.

Crews with Ancestries - Should you wish to produce a Crew of a particular Ancestry, you may also apply one of the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.QibnMkhhPYrIrwG5]{Ancestry Templates} to your Crew now.

Additional Crew Abilities - The Crew templates are designed to increase the power of the base creature to represent the strength of a team of creatures working together. While the number of Crew Abilities granted was selected to provide an adequate bump in power for the increase in level for either version of the template, you may find you wish to create a particularly well-trained or coordinated version of a Crew. In which case, you may wish to add an additional Crew Ability to your new Crew by dragging it from the tables in Step 2. Or, perhaps you wish to create an especially poorly trained Crew. You can accomplish this  by creating a Crew with less Crew Abilities than usual. 

Crews with Descriptive Templates - The math for Crews has been constructed to scale with the Base Creature's level. If you wish to apply a @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ri8fswkWP7Bimh8l]{Descriptive Templates}, you should apply it first, before applying the Crew template, to ensure the Crew template functions as intended.

Caution - Stacking Crew and Descriptive templates may produce results that are more or less powerful than expected based on the listed level adjustments.

Lore Justification

Why are Crews, groups of 4 to 6 individuals, affected by magic and other effects as if they are a single creature? While I can certainly provide a number of mechanical and balance reasons, I believe that a satisfying answer needs to make sense within the world.

The default lore for how Crews work is sympathetic magic. By sympathetic magic what I mean is that there is some effect present that makes any magic cast upon on member of the crew resonate through all members of the Crew. I've got several possible explanations for the underlying cause of this sympathetic magic; feel free to pick your favourite for your world, include different explanations for different Crews, or invent your own.

  • Ritual - The crew has undergone a ritual blending of blood, sharing of tattoos, or similar process which binds them together for good or for ill. This ritual allows the Crew to benefit from spells that would otherwise only affect one of them, though in exchange they are all affected by harmful spells that would target only a single creature.
  • Deific Involvement - One of the deities has a particular love for teamwork, and smiles upon those who sacrifice their individual needs for the good of their fellows. Teams that train together, and act as one when facing their foes, receive this deity's boon, which creates a web of sympathetic magic between the members.
  • Empathetic Resonance - The ties of sympathetic magic are not actually a conduit. Only a single creature might experience an effect, but either due to an empathetic response, or by disrupting the cohesion of the group, the aggregate effect on the group produces a result that matches what we might expect if it were cast on a single creature.

Usage

The Crew Template has been designed so that you can safely substitute any individual creature for a Crew of the same level with minimal impact on the balance of your game. If you are running a campaign where the majority of adversaries are humanoids, you may wish to increase the proportion of crews your party faces as they level up. Doing so will create a clear sense of progression as their opposition is forced to send larger numbers of foes to muster an adequate challenge to your party. This can be particularly effective if you apply the Crew template to foes your players have faced before. 

If you desire, Crews could make up the majority of the opposition in your campaign without any undue impacts on your campaign balance. However, if you do choose to take that approach, you will want to ensure the majority of treasure comes either from bosses or story/achievement rewards. The equipment carried by crews will typically be well below your party's level. 

There is of course no requirement that the Crew Template be applied only to humanoids; any creature that is between size Tiny and Large can be turned into a Crew of creatures using the templates in Step 1. This is especially useful at high levels when you may find that there are fewer premade NPCs available for use with the template. Fey and Outsiders are prime targets to turn into high level crews. 

While Crews were designed to represent groups of your party's weaker foes, if your narrative supports it a Crew can be a satisfying boss encounter. Many of the Crew Abilities give the Crew better action economy, making for more dynamic encounters.

Design Philosophy

Crews materialized as a means to counteract the "Bandit in Ebony Armour" issue that is observed in games with level-based scaling like Oblivion or Skyrim. In these games as the players level up the whole world levels up with them, which can undermine any feeling of progression, especially if your party are facing similar foes. Crews are designed to counteract that experience that by allowing you to easily throw a group of lower level adversaries against your players, while still providing a challenge appropriate to their level. By expanding the scale of their combats, it creates a sense of progression. This can be particularly effective if you apple the template to foes the party has faced before. 

The obvious question is:"Why invent Crews at all, why not simply use troops?" The answer is multi-faceted, but primarily comes down to maintaining game balance.  If you were to replace a large proportion of the creatures your PCs faced with Paizo's troops, AC becomes largely meaningless and Reflex saves play a disproportionate role in determining the defensive capabilities of the party. Moreover, on the offensive side Troop Defences shift the balance of the game considerably towards the use of low level, repeatable area effect spells as a means to reliably trigger the troops weakness and bypass the damage thresholds, while making many single target spells virtually unusable. Finally, troops are difficult to use in play, their unique mechanics and the sheer number of individual tokens to be moved (should you choose to utilize the troop's capability to spread out) make running them a lot of extra work. Meaning that Troops are best saved for the occasional encounter and are not viable as the bread and butter of your campaign.

With that in mind Crews have been designed to minimize any changes to the overall balance of the game while still allowing your players to feel as though they are fighting a large group of enemies. To this end a minor weakness to area effect and splash damage has been included to preserve the feeling of area effect magic being especially effective against groups of foes, and crews can be targeted twice for abilities such as swipe allowing your martial character who have specialized into fighting multiple foes to feel effective and in their element when fighting Crews (Note: this is not meant to include cantrips like electric arc which do not need the help, which is why I have worded the ability as effects which require you to select two adjacent creatures, but at your discretion you might choose to allow abilities like ricochet shot, through shot, or even a spell like scorching ray to target the Crew a second time. I recommend erring on the side of caution should you choose to do so, if an ability interpreted as being able to work this way seems too good to be true it probably is). But otherwise the Crew acts exactly like a single creature would, meaning spells and effects that target a single creature function normally for the Crew.  This means that aside from a minor buff to abilities designed to fight groups of enemies, the fundamental balance of the various offensive abilities is preserved. On the defensive side, Crews have standard attacks which mostly target AC, with the occasional creature having spells or abilities that allow it to target saving throws, in line with most other creatures in the bestiaries, this maintains the balance of the various defenses a player might choose from. 

Now Crews needed to be higher level than the base creature otherwise they don't serve the stated goals. I wanted the Crews to be of a reasonable size to fit on most battle maps, and settled on a group of 4 to 6 individuals. With the understanding that working closely together would allow the individuals to stand closer together, meaning they could safely occupy an area roughly equivalent to that taken up by 4 individual creatures of the same size.  One unfortunate side effect of this is that Crew's composed of huge or gargantuan creatures are not feasible due to their size, which is a real shame I love the idea of a Crew of giants. Thinking about 4 squares for medium creature sort of naturally led to considering a level adjustment of +4.  To determine the appropriate amount by which to boost the various abilities and stats for the Crew Template, the Creature Building tables from the Gamemastery Guide were used as a baseline and I looked at the average increase a creature would experience to their checks and DCs when going up 4 levels, and imitated that, with the boost being lower for low level creatures to match the slower progression in values for creatures level 4 and below.

Now when you're advancing a creature by 4 levels, raw increases to its statistics are insufficient to create a compelling creature, the creature should also have more powerful and intersting abilities. To that end I created the Crew Abilities listed in Step. These abilities were created with a mind towards developing abilities that reinforced the theme of a group of individuals working together to great effect. Like many of the other abilities included in Mercenary Market Volume 1. I've generally tried to err on the side of abilities that are more active in nature, with many of the passive abilities improving the capabilities of existing actions. The most involved of these abilities are those that relate to spellcasting.

For spellcasters a raw increase in stats is unlikely to create a satisfying or effective opponent, so an alternate means of advancement had to be considered. Three primary abilities that were created to boost the Crew's spellcasting capabilities while reinforcing the theme of a Crew of lower level mages working together,  @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.4e2sEVYnTv3ICZ01]{Joint Summoning}, @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.z8va7l2NHRjP1bEr]{Simultaneous Casting} and @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.2BsmqN6oC9qgYj7C]{United Casting}. Each of these abilities reinforces the Crew's capabilities in a different way. Joint Summoning plays on the fantasy of a group of summoners working together to call forth powerful creatures to do their bidding by providing the Crew with extra slots of high power specifically for summoning spells, of the three abilities it represents a much smaller increase in power, meaning it can be used alongside either united casting or simultaneous casting. United Casting takes the idea of many mages working together to produce greater effects by raising the level of the base creature's spell slots allowing it to upcast any of its existing low level spells. Finally, Simultaneous Casting provides the Crew with more weaker spells and allows it to simultaneously cast a cantrip along with one of its spells each turn, it balances out this power by not granting the Crew any new higher level spell slots meaning its spells will always be below the party's level. Given the large power increase represented by both United Casting and Simultaneous Casting the two cannot be used together on the same Crew. 

The Crew Templates let you quickly create a wide variety of crews from existing NPCs. With the Crew Abilities you can even generate different crews from the same Base Creature by selecting different Crew Abilities, to represent a group made up of the same foes that have undergone different training.  

The last sticking point was the lore - how do we justify this group of four to six people being treated by various spells and effects as a single creature. I've included a separate dropdown entry with my lore justifications, so such a critical detail isn't lost in these ramblings.

Ultimately I'm quite satisfied with the final result, as it allows for a campaign where your players face down a primarily human opposition without needing to have their opposition continually levelling up with them, instead you can slowly sprinkle more elite fighters and lieutenants in while using crews for the bulks of the opposition's forces. Especially at low levels the existance of the Ragtag Crew, which provides a +2 level adjustment allows for a steady sense of progression. Hopefully you'll find it as satisfying in play as I do.

用法

NPC 小队旨在作为同等级单个 NPC 的直接替代品，并对平衡造成最小影响。因此，当你的玩家一路与某个组织作战时，与其引入一个新的 12 级 NPC 杂兵，你不如引入一个由玩家之前打过的 8 级 NPC 组成的小队。以这种方式使用小队，会让人感觉随着玩家力量增长，他们的敌人被迫向他们投入更多敌人。关于小队的设计理念与用法的更多细节，可在 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.9gfeVJcuMhGzcjlY]{小队模板} 条目中找到。 

上面展示的小队都已使用小队模板进行了预先修改，不过按照小队模板的典型做法，它们的装备并未调整。在一个你将大量使用小队的战役中，你会希望通过其他来源来奖励队伍战利品，例如剧情奖励或首领掉落的战利品。 虽然你可以为小队携带的每件物品添加额外的副本，以更准确地体现小队携带的所有武器与护甲，但这样做会导致队伍获得大量低等级道具，而以我的经验，这并不值得追踪。

如同《雇佣兵市场 第1卷》中呈现的 NPC 的典型做法，小队在道具方面仅提供最低限度，基于《游戏主持指南》的表 2-4：安全物品，并只专注于基础符文进程。当你将这些小队改编为你游戏中的对手时，你可能希望为你的小队配备一些在叙事上合适的额外消耗品。

Usage

NPCs crews are intended to be direct replacements for individual NPCs of the same level, with minimal impact on balance. Thus, instead of introducing a new NPC mook of 12th level as your players fight their way through an organization, you might instead introduce a Crew made up of 8th level NPCs that the players have fought before. By utilizing Crews in this fashion, it will feel like their foes are forced to throw more enemies at them as they grow in power. More details about the design philosophy of Crews and their usage can be found in the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.9gfeVJcuMhGzcjlY]{Crew Templates} entry. 

The Crews presented above are all pre-modified using the Crew Template, however as is typical for the Crew Template, their equipment has not been adjusted. In a campaign where you are making extensive use of Crews you will want to reward the party with loot from other sources, for example, story rewards or loot from bosses.  While you can add additional copies of each item carried by the Crew to more accurately represent all the arms and armour carried by the crew, doing so results in the party receiving a lot of low level gear that is, in my experience, not worth tracking.

As is typical for the NPCs presented in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1, Crews are presented with the bare minimum for gear, based on table 2-4: Safe Items from the Gamemastery Guide, focusing solely on fundamental rune progression. When adapting these Crews for use in your games as adversaries, you may wish to equip your Crews with additional consumables that are narratively appropriate.

Descriptive Templates.name: 描述模板 Descriptive Templates
Descriptive Templates.text:
具有个性的NPC

你将在此找到一组模板集合，让你可以根据描述性形容词来修改你的NPC。每个模板都会给予基础生物一个独特的能力或动作，以体现该模板形容词所唤起的特质。许多模板也会提高或降低该生物的等级。

说明

第1步：选择模板

从下方列出的描述性模板中选择一个，与你希望NPC拥有的鲜明怪癖或特征相匹配。模板按等级调整进行整理：+1模板会使其所应用的生物等级提高1，而-1模板会使其所应用的生物等级降低1。

等级调整模板
+1

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.J3mK8pMKdEsJ1xgL]{大胆模板}

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-templates.BePu3ZhLRk3Hz19J]{老态龙钟模板}

第2步：应用模板

将你在第1步选择的描述性模板拖拽到你选择的NPC指示物或角色卡上以应用它。在你将其放到指示物或角色卡上后，模板会自动应用任何适当的加值或减值，并使用授予物品规则元素向NPC授予任何新能力。 

第3步：手动调整

许多描述性模板需要一些无法自动化的小调整。如果在应用模板后NPC的最大HP增加了，你需要将其当前HP调整到与新的最大值一致。如果你的基础生物具有非打击的效果或造成伤害的能力，则这些能力的伤害需要根据每个模板上的说明手动调整。这也是你回顾所选模板、检查其他所需手动调整的好时机。如果你选择了等级-2的模板之一，你可能需要调整该生物的施法条目。 

此外，在你回顾模板时，请留意模板中“效果”标题下列出的任何效果，因为这些需要在游戏过程中手动裁定。

用法

这些模板旨在让你能够快速调整单个生物，使其具有特定的鲜明怪癖，其中一些可能是正面的，另一些则是负面的。无论哪种情况，生物的等级都会按表格的等级调整栏所述进行调整。

尽管这些模板可能会创造出通常会被视为不常见甚至稀有的生物，但我建议你不要提高用于回忆知识的DC。各模板的强项与弱项是应与玩家分享的关键信息，并且这些模板在设计时就预期玩家会针对这些弱点或尝试避开对手的强项。让玩家更容易获得这些信息，会让他们与被修改的NPC遭遇时更加满意且更令人难忘，因为玩家可以围绕其能力进行规划。 

设计理念

这些模板的设计着重于主动能力，以及玩家能够防御或利用的特定强项或弱点。大多数模板都与一种能力相关：在有益能力的情况下，生物可以使用该能力；在有害能力的情况下，生物必须在对某个特定触发作出反应时使用该能力。

等级加值模板的设计目标是平均而言略弱于精英生物，但在进行某项可合理预期符合该形容词所描述的生物擅长之事时，其表现将优于标准精英生物。

等级+0模板的设计旨在同时包含一些正面与负面因素，并产出能力大致与基础生物相同的生物；但对于成功回忆知识了解这些生物的队伍而言，它们将稍微更容易对付，而对那些未能做到的人而言则稍微更难。

等级减值模板的设计目标是平均而言略强于弱化生物，但带有关键缺点与强制性的自由动作，玩家可以利用这些来让这些生物更容易处理。

NPCs with Personality

Here you'll find a collection of templates that allow you to modify your NPCs based on a descriptive adjective. Each template will give the base creature a unique ability or action that is evocative of the templates' adjective. Many of these templates will also increase or decrease the level of the creature.

Instructions

Step 1. Select Template

The Templates are organized by level adjustment, with +1 templates increasing the level of the creature they are applied to by 1, while -1 templates decrease the level of the creature they are applied to by 1.

Step 2. Apply Template

Apply your selected Descriptive Template from Step 1 by dragging it to the NPC token or character sheet, of your choice. After you have dropped it on the token or sheet the Template will automatically apply any appropriate bonuses or penalties and grant any new abilities using the grant item rule element to the NPC. 

Step 3. Manual Adjustments

Many of the Descriptive Templates will require small adjustments that could not be automated. If the NPC's maximum HP has increased after the application of the template, you will need to adjust their current HP to match their new maximum. If your base creature has non-strike effects or abilities that deal damage, the damage of these abilities will need to be manually adjusted according to the instructions on each template. This is also an opportune time to review your chosen template for other required manual adjustments. If you have selected one of the level -2 templates you may need to adjust the creature's spellcasting entries. 

Additionally, while you're reviewing your template, take note of any effects listed under the "effect" heading on the template, as these will need to be manually adjudicated during play.

Usage

These templates are designed to allow you to quickly adjust individual creatures to have particular evocative quirks, some of which may be positive and others detrimental. In either case, the creature's level will be adjusted as described in the Level Adjustment column of the table.

While these templates might create a creature that would typically be considered uncommon or even rare, I recommend that you do not increase the DC to recall knowledge. The strengths and weaknesses of the various templates are key pieces of information to share with your players and have been designed with the expectation that your players will be targeting these weaknesses or attempting to avoid their opposition's strengths. Making that information easier for your players to learn will make for more satisfying and memorable encounters with the modified NPCs, by allowing players to plan around their abilities. 

Design Philosophy

The templates were designed to focus on active abilities, and specific strengths or weaknesses the players can defend against or exploit. Most templates are associated with an ability that the creature either, can use, in the case of beneficial abilities, or must use in response to a certain trigger, in the case of detrimental abilities.

Level Plus templates have been designed to be slightly weaker than an elite creature on average, but will out perform a standard Elite creature, when doing something a creature that could be described with that adjective could reasonably expected to excel at.

Level +0 templates have been designed to include some positives and negatives and produce creatures that should have roughly the same capabilities as the bae creature, but will be slightly easier to combat for a party that successfully recalls knowledge about these creatures, and slightly harder for those that do not.

Level Minus templates have been designed to be slightly stronger than a weak creature on average with key detriments and mandatory free actions that the players can exploit to make these creatures easier to handle.

用法

这些NPC基于《游戏主持指南》的表2-4：安全物品，提供了最低限度的道具，且完全聚焦于基础符文的进阶。与本包中包含的其他一些NPC不同，这些NPC没有选择任何武器或护甲；取而代之的是，他们的物品栏仅包含适当的符石。在使用之前，你会想要为他们选择合适的道具。

如果你要将这些通用施法者作为重要敌人的基础使用，你会想要扩充并升级所提供的道具；尤其是，你可能希望加入消耗品，以及诸如卷轴、法杖与魔杖之类的物品。这些NPC的统计数据已经基于Paizo的生物创建指南，反映了其等级生物应有的适当数值，因此如果你要升级基础符文（+x强效符文、韧性、强击），我建议谨慎调整这些数值。不过，添加属性符文应当是可以接受的，特别是当你的玩家为5级以上时。 

这些NPC没有法术，并被设计为与@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{生成随机法术列表}宏一起使用。该宏生成的法术列表是一组合集条目，你可以将其直接拖放到对应的施法条目中。

每个NPC都提供了两个施法条目，一个用于自发施法，一个用于预备施法。每个条目的基础属性已预先选择，但你可以按需要修改。这些NPC的构建假设其中一个条目为默认条目，并据此适当地分配了能力值。例如，奥术师将智力作为其最高能力，但自发施法条目却以魅力作为关键属性。如果你希望让奥术师使用自发施法条目，你将需要更改该生物的能力值。请查看每个生物的“施法条目与能力值”被动能力，以获得针对每个NPC的具体细节与建议。

以这种方式生成的NPC施法者会比标准NPC施法者更弱，因为他们缺少基础施法以外的能力。你可能希望为他们赋予一个来自合适职业的专长、能力或专注法术，以增强其能力。 

设计理念

尽管这些施法者的进阶大致参考了Paizo发布的职业，但更强调让四种根源中的每一种施法者在某些方面都具有独特感。这主要通过豁免、AC与HP进阶的差异来实现。对于所有非奥术施法者，其豁免进阶与HP都比术士在基础等级时获得的更好。因此，秘术与原能根源的自发施法者每等级最多只获得3个法术，而奥术与神术自发施法者每等级最多获得4个。由于神术列表更为受限，我为神术预备施法者提供了如同他们拥有神圣泉源能力一样的法术位（我建议用医疗或伤害法术填充这些法术位），并且神术自发施法者每等级最多获得4个法术。 

Generic Spellcasters

Here you'll find a catalogue of prebuilt NPCs spellcasters presented without spell lists. These NPCs are intended to be used alongside the @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List} macro to quickly create unique casters for your world.

In volume 1, each spellcasting Tradition is represented by a single NPC which has been built to be usable as a creature from any level between 1 and 20.

Usage

These NPCs have been provided with a minimal amount of gear based on table 2-4: Safe Items from the Gamemastery Guide, focusing entirely on fundamental rune progression. Unlike some of the other NPCs included in this pack, no weapons or armor were selected for these NPCs; instead their inventory just includes the appropriate runestones. You will want to select appropriate gear for them before use.

If you are using these Generic Spellcasters as the base for a significant foe, you will want to expand and upgrade the gear provided; particularly, you may wish to add consumables, and things like scrolls, staves and wands. The NPC statistics already reflect appropriate values for creatures of their level based on Paizo's creature creation guidelines, so if you are upgrading the fundamental runes (+x potency runes, resilience, striking) I would recommend exercising caution with changing those values. Although, applying property runes should be acceptable, especially if your players are level 5+. 

These NPCs have no spells, and are designed for use with the @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List} macro. The spell list produced by the macro is a set of compendium entries you can drag and drop directly into the appropriate spellcasting entry.

Each NPC has been provided with two spellcasting entries, one for spontaneous casting and one for prepared casting. The base stat for each entry has been pre-selected but can be modified at your convenience. The NPCs have been built on the assumption that one of the entries is the default entry, and ability scores have been assigned appropriately. For example, the Arcanist has Intelligence as their highest ability, but the spontaneous casting entry is keyed off Charisma. Should you wish to use the spontaneous spellcasting entry for the Arcanist you will need to alter the creature's Ability Scores. Check each creature's "Spellcasting Entry & Ability Scores" passive ability for the specific details and recommendations for each NPC.

NPC spellcasters produced in this fashion will be weaker than a standard NPC spellcaster, as they lack abilities beyond basic spellcasting. You may wish to give them a feat, ability or focus spell from an appropriate class to bolster their capabilities. 

Design Philosophy

While the progression of these casters has been roughly based on the classes published by Paizo, greater emphasis has been placed on making casters of each of the four traditions feel unique in some way. This has primarily been accomplished through differences in saving throw, AC and HP progression. For all non-arcane casters, saving throw progressions and HP are improved over the base level a sorcerer would receive. Consequently, spontaneous casters of both occult and primal traditions only receive 3 spells per level maximum, while arcane and divine spontaneous casters receive 4 maximum. As the divine list is more limited I have granted prepared divine caster's slots as if they had the divine font ability (I recommend filling these slots with heal or harm spells) and divine spontaneous casters have received a maximum of 4 spells per level.

Introduction to Mercenary Marketplace Vo.name: 雇佣兵市场指南 第1卷 导言 Introduction to Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1
Introduction to Mercenary Marketplace Vo.text:
简介

感谢你购买《佣兵市集》第一卷。在此模块中，你将找到373个可直接用于你的战役的新通用NPC，以及29个模板，可让你自定义现有的生物库。 

目录中提供了快速链接，帮助你找到所有新内容。要快速访问目录，请将 @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.X1a1jfoWS4EqGETN]{Toggle MM Volume 1 Directory} 宏保存到你的热键栏。

如果你遇到任何bug或其他问题，你可以在相关的GitHub Issues Tracker中进行反馈

我希望你在使用这些新NPC时获得的乐趣，能和我在创作它们时一样多！

新NPC

《佣兵市集》第一卷包含五大类NPC。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.JWFJTzMI86q256tm]{带职业的NPC}，旨在作为《核心规则书》中各个职业的标志性代表。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.m3ez8MLOFi0NWUSH]{带工作职责的NPC}，旨在擅长在战斗中执行特定职责。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.XAdP7FZyWoeMEfRI]{通用施法者}，完整填写了数据的NPC，只待加入你自定义的或随机生成的法术列表。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{小队}，用于向你的玩家发起挑战的一小组敌人。所提供的小队是已应用“小队”模板的NPC示例。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.LVylAkC1NWnXxLul]{部队}，用于向你的玩家发起挑战的一大群敌人。

你可以通过以下三种方式之一找到《佣兵市集》第一卷中的所有新NPC。

  1. 浏览目录中列出的NPC图录。为便于浏览，新NPC已按类型整理为五个有组织的图录。每个图录都按等级以及相应的职业或战斗职责排序。

  2. 使用怪物图鉴浏览器。你可以使用“来源”筛选器来浏览新NPC。此外，NPC会根据其职业或战斗职责被赋予标签，从而让你可以按这些特征进行筛选。

  3. 在你的资料库包标签页中打开《佣兵市集》第一卷NPC资料库。

新模板

《佣兵市集》第一卷包含三种类型的模板。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.QibnMkhhPYrIrwG5]{族裔模板}，可让你快速将某个族裔应用到现有NPC上。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.9gfeVJcuMhGzcjlY]{小队模板}，可让你将任意NPC转换为由4到6个NPC组成、协同作战的小队。

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ri8fswkWP7Bimh8l]{描述性模板}，会基于某个描述性形容词，为NPC赋予特定主题的优势或劣势。

你可以通过以下三种方式之一找到所有新模板。

  1. 浏览目录中列出的模板图录。为便于浏览，这些模板已按模板类型整理为三个有组织的图录。

  2. 使用资料库浏览器。你可以使用“模板”特征的特征筛选器来浏览新模板。

  3. 在你的资料库包标签页中打开《佣兵市集》第一卷生物模板资料库。

其他内容

随着小队与模板的加入，引入了几个带有相关规则的新特征。这些规则已在对应章节中详细说明，但为便于查阅，也已汇编于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ysvcY0zFgA6pn1Ak]{新规则} 日志条目中。

本模块还包含一些新的 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.62pBbzbgeMFzOeHD]{宏}：第一个会根据用户输入生成随机法术列表，非常适合与通用施法者搭配使用。第二个可用于快速设置“巫术化NPC模板”所需的施法条目，使你能迅速为NPC增添一抹魔法力量。 

 

NPC图录

Introduction

Thank you for purchasing Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1. Within this module you'll find 373 new generic NPCs ready to use in your campaigns and 29 templates that will let you customize your existing library of creatures. 

Quick links to help you find all your new content are provided in the directory. For quick access to the directory, save the @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.X1a1jfoWS4EqGETN]{Toggle MM Volume 1 Directory} macro to your hotbar.

If you encounter any bugs or other issues, you can report them at the associated GitHub Issues Tracker

I hope you have as much fun using all these new NPCs as I did creating them!

New NPCs

There are five broad categories of NPCs included in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.JWFJTzMI86q256tm]{NPCs with Classes} which are designed to be iconic representatives of the various classes from the Core Rulebook.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.m3ez8MLOFi0NWUSH]{NPCs with Jobs} which are designed to excel at performing specific roles in combat.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.XAdP7FZyWoeMEfRI]{Generic Spellcasters} which are fully statted-out NPCs awaiting the addition of your custom, or randomly generated, spell list.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{Crews} which are small groups of foes to challenge your players with. The provided Crews are examples of NPCs that have had the Crew template applied to them.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.LVylAkC1NWnXxLul]{Troops} which are large groups of foes to challenge your players with.

You can find all the new NPCs included in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 one of three ways.

  1. By browsing the NPC Catalogues listed in the Directory. For ease of browsing, the new NPCs have been curated into five organized catalogues based on type. Each catalogue is sorted by level and class or combat role as appropriate.

  2. Using the Bestiary Browser. You can browse your new NPCs using the Source filter. Additionally, NPCs have been given tags based on either their class or combat role, allowing you to filter by those traits.

  3. Opening the Mercenary Marketplace Vol. 1 NPCs Compendium in your Compendium Packs tab.

New Templates

There are three types of templates included in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.QibnMkhhPYrIrwG5]{Ancestry Templates} which allow you to quickly apply an ancestry to an existing NPC.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.9gfeVJcuMhGzcjlY]{Crew Templates} which allow you to convert any NPC into a crew of four to six NPCs working in unison.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ri8fswkWP7Bimh8l]{Descriptive Templates} which grant an NPC specific thematic advantages or detriments based on a descriptive adjective.

You can find all your new Templates in one of three ways.

  1. By browsing the Template Catalogues listed in the Directory. For ease of browsing, the templates have been curated into three organized catalogues by template type.

  2. Using the Compendium Browser. You can browse your new Templates by using the trait filter for the Template trait.

  3. Opening the Mercenary Marketplace Vol. 1 Creature Templates Compendium in your Compendium Packs tab.

Other Content

With the addition of Crews and Templates a couple new traits have been introduced that have some associated rules. These rules have been detailed in the appropriate sections, but for ease of reference have been complied in the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.ysvcY0zFgA6pn1Ak]{New Rules} journal entry.

This module also includes some new @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.62pBbzbgeMFzOeHD]{Macros}, the first of which generates randomized spell lists based on user input, and is ideal for use with the generic spellcasters. The second can be used to quickly set up the requisite spellcasting entries for the Sorcerous NPC template, which allows you to quickly add a splash of magical power to your NPCs. 

 

NPC Catalogues

Macros.name: 宏 Macros
Macros.text:
宏

佣兵市场第一卷中包含十号宏。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.X1a1jfoWS4EqGETN]{切换佣兵市场第 1 卷目录宏}。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{生成随机法术列表宏}。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.PD5Cfm0Sv85aFFna]{术法模板设置宏}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.GFc0qSPQQb7UrN06]{奥术先祖戏法}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.6h2oa86ZN4xOPSQq]{神圣先祖戏法}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.t73Cb6tJzvKwd3sI]{秘法先祖戏法}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.g5wjnIPgSqByo7Kq]{原初先祖戏法}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.A36zBYLenNrDZdc6]{授予天生法术}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.wa9vZFw2Rq3w7wxm]{切换队伍衍生物标识艺术}。
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.Fw3CkdGHIa3mRM21]{设置队伍背景}。

切换佣兵市场目录

运行时，此宏将会执行以下之一：

A) 打开《佣兵市场第一卷》目录日志条目。

B) 如果目录已打开但不是你的活动窗口，则会将其置前并最大化。

C) 如果目录是你的活动窗口，则会将其关闭。

生成随机法术列表

运行时，此宏将根据你的规格，基于你选择的根源生成一份随机法术列表。你可以限制其可抽取的法术稀有度，包含列表中法术的升阶版本，并优先或禁用特定特征。

使用描述查询字段，你可以优先选择描述中包含特定词语的法术。例如，你可以优先选择会施加惊惧（状态）的法术，或描述中包含“bone”一词的法术。

该宏会根据你输入的数值，为每个等级生成一定数量的法术，且不重复。如果没有任何法术仍符合你的规格，它将改为从未筛选的列表中抽取。

术法模板设置

运行时，此宏会将术法施法添加到你打开的 NPC 角色卡（若其为你的活动窗口），或在当前没有任何 NPC 角色卡作为活动窗口时，添加到你所选中的 NPC 衍生物标识。

它会添加一个自发施法条目（每个等级 1 个法术位），以及一个聚能施法条目（1 点聚能点），并用你所选的术法血脉所授予的法术与血脉法术填充这些条目。该宏还会将 NPC 在与该血脉施法根源相对应的技能上设置为一个由 NPC 等级决定的数值（若该数值高于 NPC 未调整的技能）。

授予先祖戏法

运行时，这些宏会为你打开的 NPC 角色卡（若其为你的活动窗口），或在当前没有任何 NPC 角色卡作为活动窗口时，为你所选中的 NPC 衍生物标识，添加一个相应根源（奥术、神圣、秘法或原初）的天生施法条目。

每个根源都有单独的宏，它会提示你选择该根源的一个戏法；随后它会添加一个相应根源的天生施法条目，并用你选择的戏法填充该施法条目，同时将法术DC与法术攻击调整设置为适当的数值。

注意 如果 NPC 已经有一个施法条目，你很可能会希望修改新增的 DC，以更好地反映其施法熟练度。每个都有一个单独的宏

授予天生法术

运行时，此宏会为你打开的 NPC 角色卡（若其为你的活动窗口），或在当前没有任何 NPC 角色卡作为活动窗口时，为你所选中的 NPC 衍生物标识添加一个天生施法条目。

该条目的根源与关键属性由角色上的标记（flags）设定。类似的标记也允许你指定要添加到该条目的法术。通过这些标记，它会添加一个相应根源的天生施法条目，并将施法条目填充为标记中指定的法术，将其升阶至指定等级，并设置指定的使用次数。

技术规格
示例请参见 @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.G2DiKLuUrOQ8ifUN]{精灵，先知} 的规则元素。

若你想制作自己的标记，存放标记的路径为：flags.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}。其中 {tradition} 替换为所需根源：arcane、divine、occult 或 primal。

关键能力调整值存储在 mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}.keyStat，应使用三字母缩写指定：str、dex、con、int、wis 或 cha。

法术存储在 mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}.spells。每个法术按以下格式添加：["Source", "Spell Name", Level, Uses]。Level 与 Uses 可省略，此时它们将分别默认为该法术的基础等级与 1。法术名称应使用首字母大写，例如 "Detect Magic"，而来源条目可以设置为任意字符串值。

切换队伍衍生物标识艺术

运行时，此宏会在任何被选中的角色上切换一个标记（flag），以告知模块用队伍艺术替换所选衍生物标识的图像。

队伍艺术由一个背景与四份衍生物标识图像的拷贝组合而成。该模块自带四个可用背景，或者你也可以提供你自己的 1440 x 1440 图像。

此过程大多是非破坏性的，并且不占用任何存储空间。然而，如果你使用的衍生物标识缩放比例被设置为不同于 1，该缩放将会被此宏修改；若你将队伍艺术关闭，则需要手动将其重置。

设置队伍背景

运行时，此宏会将所选衍生物标识的队伍艺术背景更改为你选择的图像，而不是使用《佣兵市场第一卷》模块设置中指定的默认背景。

Macros

There are ten macros included in Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1.

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.X1a1jfoWS4EqGETN]{Toggle Mercenary Marketplace Vol. 1 Directory Macro}.

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.dLMmYYevbHCikFnH]{Generate a Random Spell List Macro}.

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.PD5Cfm0Sv85aFFna]{Sorcerous Template Setup Macro}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.GFc0qSPQQb7UrN06]{Arcane Ancestral Cantrip}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.6h2oa86ZN4xOPSQq]{Divine Ancestral Cantrip}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.t73Cb6tJzvKwd3sI]{Occult Ancestral Cantrip}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.g5wjnIPgSqByo7Kq]{Primal Ancestral Cantrips}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.A36zBYLenNrDZdc6]{Grant Innate Spells}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.wa9vZFw2Rq3w7wxm]{Toggle Crew Token Art}.
@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-macros.Macro.Fw3CkdGHIa3mRM21]{Set Crew Background}.

Toggle Mercenary Marketplace Directory

When run, this macro will either:

A) Open the Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 Directory journal entry.

B) If the Directory is already open and not your active window, it will bring it to the front and maximize it.

C) If the Directory is your active window it will close it.

Generate a Random Spell List

When run, this macro will generate a random list of spells of your chosen tradition(s) based on your specifications. You can limit the rarity of spells it can pull from, include heightened versions of spells on the list, and prioritize or ban specific traits.

Using the description query field you can prioritize spells that include certain words in their description. This allows for example for you to prioritize spells that grant the frightened condition, or spells that including the word bone.

The macro will generate a number of spells for each level based on the value you input, with no duplicates. If no spells remain that match your specifications, it will instead pull from an unfiltered list.

Sorcerous Template Setup

When run, this macro will add sorcerous spellcasting to either the NPC character sheet you have open (if it is your active window), or the NPC token you have selected if no NPC character sheet is your currently active window.

It will add a spontaneous spellcasting entry with 1 spell slot per level, and a focus spellcasting entry with 1 focus point and populate these entries with the granted spells and bloodlines spells for your selected Sorcerous bloodline. The macro will also set the NPC's skill for the skill associated with that bloodline's spellcasting tradition to a value determined by the NPC's level, if that value is higher than the NPC's unmodified skill.

Grant Ancestral Cantrips

When run, these macro will add an innate spellcasting entry of the appropriate tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal) to either the NPC character sheet you have open (if it is your active window), or the NPC token you have selected if no NPC character sheet is your currently active window.

Each tradition has a separate macro, which will prompt you to select a single cantrip of that tradition, it will then add a innate spellcasting entry of the appropriate tradition and populate the spellcasting entry with your chosen cantrip and set the spell DC and spell attack modifier to appropriate values.

Note if the NPC already has a spellcasting entry you will likely wish to modify the added DC to better reflect their spellcasting proficiency. There is a separate macro for each

Grant Innate Spells

When run, this macro will add an innate spellcasting entry to either the NPC character sheet you have open (if it is your active window), or the NPC token you have selected if no NPC character sheet is your currently active window.

The entries tradition and key stat are set by flags on the actor. Similar flags also allow you to specify the spells to be added to this entry. Using these flags it will add an innate spellcasting entry of the appropriate tradition and populate the spellcasting entry with the spell specified in the flags heightened to the specified level and with the specified number of uses.

Technical Specifications
For an example see the rule elements for @Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-abilities.G2DiKLuUrOQ8ifUN]{Elf, Seer}.

The path to store the flags should you wish to make your own is: flags.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}. Where {tradition} is replaced with the desired tradition arcane, divine, occult, or primal.

The key ability modifier is stored at mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}.keyStat and should be specified using the three letter abbreviation str, dex, con, int, wis, or cha.

The spell are stored at mercenary-marketplace.grantedSpellcasting.{tradition}.spells. Each spell is added in the following format. ["Source", "Spell Name", Level, Uses]. Level and Uses can be omitted in which case they will default to the spells base level and 1 respectively. The spell name should be capitalized for example "Detect Magic", and the source entry can be set to any string value.

Toggle Crew Token Art

When run, this macro will toggle a flag on any selected actors telling the module to replace the selected tokens' artwork with crew artwork.

Crew artwork is created by combining a background with four copies of the token's artwork. This module ships with four backgrounds you can use, or you can provide your own 1440 x 1440 image.

This process is mostly non-destructive and doesn't use any storage space. However if you are using a token that has a scale set to be different than 1, that scale will be modified by the macro and you'll need to manually reset it if you toggle the crew artwork off.

Set Crew Background

When run, this macro will change crew artwork background for the selected tokens to an image of your choice, instead of using the default background specified in the Mercenary Marketplace Volume 1 module settings.

New Rules.name: 新规则 New Rules
New Rules.text:
新规则 - 快速参考

小队特征

小队特征表示某个生物实际上是由4到6名受过训练的个体组成的集合，并以一致的方式协同作战。任何具有小队特征的生物，在法术与效果的适用上都被视为单一生物。然而，对于要求你选择两个相邻生物的能力（例如横扫），它可以被选择两次。

强制特征

强制特征只会施加于带有触发的能力。若某个带有强制特征的能力其触发发生，则拥有该能力的生物必须使用它，即使这会对该生物不利。

New Rules - Quick Reference

Crew Trait

The Crew trait indicates that a creature is actually a collection of 4 to 6 trained individuals working together in unison. Any creature with the Crew trait is treated as a single creature for the purposes of spells and effects. However, it may be selected twice for abilities that require you to select two adjacent creatures, such as swipe.

Mandatory Trait

The Mandatory trait is only ever applied to abilities with a trigger. If the trigger occurs for an ability with the Mandatory trait a creature with that ability must use it, even if it is to the creature's detriment.

用法

我们提供了带有职业的NPC，适用于 1 到 18 级，让你在大多数战役中只需极少修改即可使用。

近战角色以三个等级的范围列出，例如 [1-3]。该NPC为中位等级；然而，通过应用精英或弱小模板，你可以将这些NPC用于范围内所列的更高或更低等级。

施法角色以两个等级的范围列出，例如 [1-2]。你会发现实际的NPC是这两个等级中较高的那个。考虑到学习新的法术等级会带来力量与多样性的提升，建议不要对这些NPC使用精英模板，但它们与弱小模板可轻松兼容。此外，鉴于弱小模板会对法术伤害进行调整，我不建议调整法术位数量。

这些NPC基于《游戏主持人指南》中表 2-4：安全物品提供了最少量的道具，完全专注于基础符文的进度。虽然这意味着你可以将他们以最小的影响直接放入你的游戏中（对队伍的宝藏影响较小），但如果你将他们作为重要敌人的基础，你会想要扩充并升级其所提供的道具，特别是消耗品、穿戴或持用的魔法物品，以及为施法NPC准备的卷轴、法杖与魔杖等。请注意，NPC数据已根据Paizo的生物制作指南反映了其等级对应的适当数值，因此如果你要升级基础符文（+x 力量符文、抗力、强击），我建议在改变这些数值时保持谨慎；不过，添加属性符文的效果应当是可以接受的，尤其当你的玩家为 5 级以上时。

这些NPC被设计为最适合用作具名反派，可以直接不作修改使用，或按需进行微调。虽然带有职业的NPC也可以被投放到世界中，用以代表相应玩家职业的通用反派，但应当注意避免“天际强盗”问题——即所有背景NPC都会随着队伍一起升级。如果你希望用通用小兵来挑战高等级队伍，那么 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{战团} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.LVylAkC1NWnXxLul]{部队} 可能更合适，同时也能保持更强的成长感。

设计理念

这些NPC旨在模拟玩家职业，尽管在许多情况下，为了让GM更容易运作，这些能力已被简化、压缩或重新设定风味。为了恰当地捕捉各自职业的风味，这些带有职业的NPC往往比《佣兵市场》第一卷中包含的其他NPC拥有更多能力，使其运作起来更复杂。这些设计选择使带有职业的NPC最适合用作具名反派。尽管如此，这些NPC的能力通常仍会少于同等级的PC，并且没有尝试纳入技能专长或族裔专长，而是以牺牲这份多样性来换取Paizo生物构建指南中所固有的些许原始力量提升。

尽管我们尝试捕捉每个职业的精髓与风味，但我们并未将自己限制在《核心规则书》所描述的能力与专长之内，并创建了一些自定义能力。这些新能力并未被写成面向玩家的专长，但它们可以被改编为罕见或稀有的玩家选项。不过，如果不做任何调整就直接改编，它们往往会比同等级的标准玩家选项略强一些，因为NPC通常拥有更少但略更强的能力，以弥补其多样性的不足并使其更易于运作。

总体而言，我们尝试移除或修改那些可能令玩家感到挫败的能力。例如，许多职业会获得能力，将其最高豁免上的成功升级为大成功或大失败中的大成功；考虑到NPC的豁免相对较高，这会让施法PC非常沮丧。为此，我们省略了许多此类能力，除非我们认为这些能力对职业风味至关重要，例如游荡者的闪避。

这些角色的成长进度以其各自职业为模型，并在适当之处做了轻微偏离。

@Compendium[pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-actors.R4kFk0cHffbdGhbw]{Mercenary Wizard [17-18]}

Usage

NPCs with class have been provided for use for levels between 1 and 18, allowing you to use them with minimal modification for the majority of any campaign.

Melee characters are listed with a range of three levels, for example [1-3]. The NPC is of the median level; however by applying either the Elite or Weak template, you can use those NPCs for the higher or lower level listed in the range. 

Spellcasting characters are listed with a range of two levels, for example [1-2]. You'll find the actual NPC is the higher of the two levels. Given the increase in power and versatility that comes with learning a new level of spells, it is recommended that you do not use these NPCs with the Elite template, but they are readily compatible with the Weak template. Furthermore, given the adjustments applied by the Weak template to spell damage, I do not recommend adjusting the number of spell slots.

NPCs have been provided with a minimal amount of gear based on table 2-4: Safe Items from the Gamemastery Guide, focusing entirely on fundamental rune progression. While this means you can slot them into your game with a minimal impact on your party's treasure, if you are using them as the base for a significant foe you will want to expand upon and upgrade upon the gear provided, particularly in terms of consumables, worn or held magic items, and things like scrolls, staves and wands for spellcasting NPCs. Please note however, the NPC statistics already reflect appropriate values for creatures of their level, based on Paizo's creature creation guidelines, so if you are upgrading the fundamental runes (+x potency runes, resilience, striking) I would recommend exercising caution with changing those values, although applying the effects of property runes should be acceptable, especially if your players are level 5+. 

These NPCs are designed to be most appropriate for use as named antagonists,  either directly unmodified or tweaked to match your needs. While NPCs with Class can be dropped into the world to represent generic antagonists of the appropriate player class, care should be taken to avoid the Skyrim bandit problem, where all the background NPCs level up with the party. If you are looking to challenge a high level party with generic underlings, either @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{Crews} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.LVylAkC1NWnXxLul]{Troops} may be more suitable while maintaining a stronger sense of progression. 

Design Philosophy

These NPCs have been designed to emulate player classes, although in many cases abilities have been simplified, condensed or reflavoured to make the NPCs easier to run for GMs. To appropriately capture the flavour of their respective classes, these NPCs with Class tend to have more abilities, than the other NPCs included in Mercenary Market Volume 1, making them more complex to run. These design choices make NPCs with class most appropriate for use as named antagonists. Although, these NPCs will still tend to have fewer  abilities than a PC of the same level, and no attempt has been made to include skill feats or ancestry feats, instead trading that versatility for the slight increase in raw power that is intrinsic to Paizo's creature building guidelines.

While we have attempted to capture the essence and flavour of each class, we have not restricted ourselves to the abilities and feats described in the core rulebook, some custom abilities have been created. While these new abilities have not been written up as player facing feats, they could be adapted for uncommon or rare player options. Although, if adapted without any tweaking, they will tend to be slightly more powerful than standard player options of the same level, as NPCs tend have fewer, slightly more powerful abilities, to make up for their lack of versatility and to make them easier to run.

Generally an attempt has been made to remove or modify abilities that are likely to be frustrating for players. For example, many classes get abilities to upgrade successes on saves to critical successes for their highest save, which given the relatively high saves of NPCs can be very frustrating for spellcasting PCs. To counteract this, we have omitted many of these abilities, except in cases were we felt these abilities were essential to the flavour of the class, such as Evasion on the Rogue.

The progression of these characters is modelled after that of their respective classes, with slight deviations as appropriate.

用法

一些NPC可以胜任多个定位，因此会在表格中的多个位置出现。

近战角色以三个等级的范围列出，例如[1-3]。该NPC为范围的中位等级；不过，通过应用精英或虚弱模板，你可以将这些NPC用于该范围中较高或较低的等级。

施法角色以两个等级的范围列出，例如[1-2]。你会发现实际的NPC是这两个等级中较高的那个。鉴于学习新的法术等级会带来力量与多用性的提升，建议你不要对这些NPC使用精英模板，但它们与虚弱模板可以轻松兼容。此外，考虑到虚弱模板对法术伤害所做的调整，我不建议调整法术位数量。

这些NPC依据《游戏主持指南》中表2-4：安全物品，提供了最少量的道具，并完全聚焦于基础符文进程。虽然这意味着你可以以最小的影响将他们放入你的游戏、而不怎么影响队伍的宝藏，但如果你要将其作为重要敌人的基础，你会希望扩充或升级其所提供的道具，尤其是在消耗品、穿戴或持有的魔法物品，以及对施法NPC而言诸如卷轴、法杖与魔杖之类的物品上。NPC的数据已经依据Paizo的生物创作指引，反映了其等级生物应有的恰当数值，因此如果你正在升级基础规则（+x强效规则、韧性、强击），我建议在改变这些数值时保持谨慎；不过，应用性质符文的效果应当是可接受的，尤其当你的玩家达到5级以上时。

这些NPC被设计为比带有职业的NPC复杂度更低，特别适合作为支援角色使用。对于主要的具名反派，可能有益的是从合适的职业、族裔或技能中选择1到2个专长来提升其多用性，使其成为更复杂的反派。

对于更高等级的威胁，设计意图是这种单个NPC不再对队伍构成威胁，你需要过渡到使用@UUID[Compendium.pf2e-mercenary-marketplace-vol1.mmv1-journals.1s34nyLF4vYUxsHX.JournalEntryPage.J5arLCsj7pbrI1eQ]{Crews}。我刻意没有制作任何超过12级的“工作型”NPC，以明确鼓励这一过渡。

设计理念

在制作这些NPC时，我将他们划分为七种不同的战斗定位。每个NPC都被设计为履行这些战斗定位中的一种或多种，同时保持与该NPC所从事工作的核心身份一致。因此，能力的设计使得战术家的能力会让人感觉适合以战术谋生的人，而死灵法师的能力会让人感觉适合能令亡者复起的人，即便二者都作为领袖发挥作用。与带有职业的NPC相比，有工作的NPC通常被设计为拥有更少且更简单的能力，以便更容易操控；并且虽然这些NPC也能成为出色的具名反派，但他们的设计往往更简单，使其尤其适合作为喽啰使用。

这些NPC中有许多拥有全新的能力，尤其贴合其主题；这些能力往往会比同等级的玩家能力更强，以补偿这些NPC与玩家角色相比在广度上的相对不足。不过，只要稍作调整，一位雄心勃勃的GM就可以将这些独特机制，以及在低等级与高等级工作型NPC之间展示的进程，转化为面向玩家的范型。总体而言，这些能力中的许多旨在让玩家可见。我的意思是，它们应该能通过回忆知识被发现，并且这些能力被设计为NPC会主动去做的事情，而不是被动加值。若确实存在被动加值，我也努力使其足够显著且足够直观；基于这一理念，我希望你的玩家能根据他们面对的NPC类型，猜到应当避免某种战术或选择何种豁免。

我在本合集里只收录了1到12级的NPC；基于Paizo所创作的内容，我认为1到12级是这些更通用NPC在力量层级上可信的范围，并且可以在不破坏真实感的情况下，被可行地放入你的冒险路径与格拉利昂游戏中。随着你的队伍进入中高等级，单个NPC会让位给NPC小队，以便恰当地挑战你的玩家，同时营造一种现实的尺度增长感，体现你的PC能够完成之事的范围与利害不断提升。借助小队模板，这些敌人因此可以一直作为可行的威胁，直到你的战役最后几个等级。
